name: Macaroni and Beef Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch skillet, brown the beef, sausage and onion; drain fat.
2. Add tomato paste, water, oregano and salt; simmer for 5 minutes.
3. In a 2 1/2 quart casserole dish, layer half the macaroni, half the meat sauce and half the cheese.
4. Repeat layers using remaining macaroni, meat sauce and cheese.
5. Bake at 375 degrees F for 20 to 25 minutes.
